task.title: How to use the Clarification Overview Report to find specific information?
For which Clarification type, highest number of clarifications were sent? How many clarifications were sent for SEV clarification type?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Clarification Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Clarifications by Facility and Clarification Type chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays clarifications sent for each clarification type and for each facility. Use this chart to analyze the following:
What percentage of total sent clarifications by a facility are SEV clarifications?
What is the count of PDX clarifications sent by a facility?
For a specific which type of clarifications were sent for maximum time?
Count of MCC clarifications sent by a CDS. To view the count select the CDS name from the CDS filter.

task.title: What is the overall Clarification Rate, Response Rate, and Agreement Rate at the organization level and for a specific facility?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Clarification Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the following KPI cards at the top of the Clarification Overview report:

ul.li: Encounter Clarification Rate: Count of reviewed encounters with at-least one Clarification / Total Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) X 100
Clarification Rate: Total Clarifications Sent / Encounters Reviewed (Initial Reviews) x 100
Response Rate: Total Responded Clarifications / Total Clarifications Sent x 100
Agreement Rate: Total Agreed Clarifications / Total Responded Clarifications X 100

step.cmd: To analyze this data for a specific facility, select the facility from the Facility filter.

task.title: How many clarifications were sent for Medicare cases?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Clarification Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyse the Clarifications by Facility and Payer chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays count of clarifications sent for each payer and for each facility. Also use this chart to analyze the following:
What percentage of total clarifications sent by a facility for the Medicare cases.
Which facility has the highest percentage of total clarifications for the Medicare cases.
What type of clarifications are sent for the Medicare cases? To view this click the Medicare section in the Clarifications by Facility and Payer chart and the data is filtered in the Clarifications by Facility and Clari Type chart. The Clarifications by Facility and Clari Type now displays data for the Medicare cases. This helps you to identify the clarification types associated with the sent clarifications for the Medicare cases.

task.title: How does the Response Rate and Agreement Rate look like for the Medicare cases?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Clarification Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Enc Clarification Rate, Response Rate, and Agreement Rate by Facility charts.
step.stepresult:
These charts help you to identify the following:
Facility with highest response and agreement rate
Response and agreement rate for the Medicare cases. To view this, select Medicare from the Payer filter.

task.title: What is the overall Review Rate? How does Review Rate look like for a specific facility?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Clarification Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Review Rate KPI card.
step.stepresult: This card displays an overall review rate for all the facilities report that you have access.

step.cmd: Analyze the Encounter KPI card.
step.stepresult: This card displays total discharges in the selected date range.

step.cmd: To identify the review rate for a specific facility, CDS or payer, select the facility, CDS or payer from the filter.

task.title: What percentage of sent clarifications has potential for financial impact?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Clarification Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Financial Impact and Other Impact Clarifications by Facility chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays count of financially impacted and other impacted sent clarifications for each facility. This chart helps you to identify the following:
Which facility has the highest number of financially impacted clarification?
What percentage of total sent clarifications for a facility has potential for financial impact?
How many financially impacted clarifications are sent for Medicare cases by each facility? To view this select Medicare from the Payer filter.
How many financially impacted clarifications are sent by a CDS. To view this select the name of the CDS from the CDS filter.

task.title: Which facility has the highest response and agreement rate?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Clarification Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Enc Clarification Rate, Response Rate, and the Agreement Rate by Facility charts.
step.stepresult: These charts help you to identify the facility that has the highest response and agreement rate.

task.title: What is the Average Response TAT for each facility?

step.cmd: Select Program Management from the Analytics screen.
Select the Clarification Overview tab.
step.stepresult: The report displays data for last one calendar month based on the discharge date.

step.cmd: Select the time range from the Discharge Date filter.
Analyze the Avg. Response TAT(Hrs) by Facility chart.
step.stepresult:
This chart displays average response turnaround time for each facility. This chart also helps to identify the following:
Which facility has highest average response TAT?
What is the average response TAT for Medicare cases for a facility? To view this select Medicare from the Payer filter.
What is the average response TAT for clarifications sent by a CDS? To view this select the name of the CDS from the CDS filter.
